title: schedonorus font-queri
intro: Schedonorus font-queri, also known as timber grass or bunchgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Schedonorus font-queri can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and its dried roots and leaves can also be used in tinctures and salves.
